title: Space Data Hitting AI! Musk Unveils SpaceX's Resources, 2 Trillion Parameter Grok Model is About to Be Forged
excerpt: To build a stronger artificial intelligence, Musk once again demonstrated his ability to integrate resources across industries. He recently announced that the t
content_html:
To build a stronger artificial intelligence, Musk once again demonstrated his ability to integrate resources across industries. He recently announced that the top engineering data accumulated by SpaceX since its establishment in 2002 will be officially used to train the next generation of Grok large models.

Remove sensitive information to ensure compliance

The scale of data involved in this training is unprecedented, covering core areas such as manufacturing processes, materials science, and Starlink hardware design. However, due to U.S. export control regulations, defense-sensitive technologies such as rocket engines and guidance control have been strictly excluded.

It is understood that the new model will have an astonishing parameter count of two trillion, doubling the size of the recently released Grok 4.5. This massive data project is expected to complete the final training this week and demonstrate reasoning capabilities surpassing previous ones.

Collaborative efforts to build a data empire

This cross-industry collaboration fully aligns with Musk's consistent strategy of data synergy. Before this, Tesla provided real-world driving and manufacturing experience, while social platforms contributed massive amounts of daily conversation data.

Now, with the addition of aerospace engineering data, the Grok model will gain extremely unique capabilities. From cars to social media to rockets, Musk is gradually transforming the core assets of his empire into a moat in the AI field.

sentences.en: From cars to social media to rockets, Musk is gradually transforming the core assets of his empire into a moat in the AI field.
sentences.zh: 从汽车到社交媒体再到火箭，马斯克正逐步将其帝国的核心资产转变为人工智能领域的护城河。

content_html_zh:
为了打造更强大的人工智能，马斯克再次展示了他跨行业整合资源的能力。 他近日宣布，SpaceX自2002年成立以来积累的顶尖工程数据将正式用于训练下一代Grok大型模型。

删除敏感信息以确保合规性

本次培训涉及的数据规模空前，涵盖制造工艺、材料科学、星链硬件设计等核心领域。 但由于美国出口管制法规，火箭发动机、制导控制等国防敏感技术被严格排除在外。

据了解，新模型的参数数量将达到惊人的两万亿，是最近发布的 Grok 4.5 规模的两倍。 这个海量数据项目预计将于本周完成最终训练，并展现出超越以往的推理能力。

协力打造数据帝国

这种跨行业合作完全符合马斯克一贯的数据协同战略。 在此之前，特斯拉提供了现实世界的驾驶和制造经验，而社交平台则贡献了大量的日常对话数据。

现在，随着航空航天工程数据的加入，Grok 模型将获得极其独特的功能。 从汽车到社交媒体再到火箭，马斯克正逐步将其帝国的核心资产转变为人工智能领域的护城河。
